column2: Mapping Test Scenarios with Test Cases (ZEE5.com)

column3: Verify user can register with valid details
column4:
1.User should open Microsoft Edge browser
2.User should navigate to https://www.zee5.com/
3.User should click on Sign Up/Register option on the ZEE5 homepage
4.User should enter valid Full Name, Email ID/Mobile Number and Password
5.User should verify OTP if required
6.User should click on Register/Submit button

column3: Verify user can login with valid credentials
column4:
1. Open Microsoft Edge browser
2. Navigate to https://www.zee5.com/
3. Click on Login

5. Click on Login button
column6: User should login successfully and dashboard should be displayed
column7: User should login successfully and dashboard should be displayed
